name: Therapeutic plasma exchange plus IVIG
summary: Invasive plasma-exchange combination with IVIG, tracked separately from TPE alone because the strongest signals use combination protocols.
mechanism_summary: Combines removal and replacement of plasma components with immunoglobulin support, potentially shifting systemic inflammatory, proteomic, and immune signals.

open_questions: Whether the IVIG component is necessary for observed signals
Whether Alzheimer disease functional context or multi-omic biomarkers translate to broader aging use cases
